---
title: "Species Database"
subtitle: "Historical Accession Records (1970-Present)"
---

This database catalogs every native BC seed plant (and select ferns) grown at the UBC Botanical Garden since 1970.

**Instructions:**
Use the search bar below to filter by Family, Genus, or Species. Click the column headers to sort.

:::{.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Download Data:** [Click here to download the full CSV file](/data/ubcbg_unique_taxa_with_accessions.csv)
:::

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false

// 1. Load the data
data = FileAttachment("/data/database.csv").csv({ typed: true })

// 2. Search Bar
viewof searchResults = Inputs.search(data, { 
  label: "Search Database:",
  placeholder: "Type a Family, Genus, Species, or Year...", // <--- Updated Text
  columns: ["FamilyEx", "Genus", "Species", "AccessionList"]
})

// 3. Table Display
Inputs.table(searchResults, {
  columns: [
    "FamilyEx",
    "Genus",
    "Species",
    "AccessionList"
  ],
  header: {
    FamilyEx: "Family",
    Genus: "Genus",
    Species: "Species",
    AccessionList: "Accession Codes"
  },
  sort: true,
  rows: 20,
  layout: "auto"
})
```
